note: Q2 2026 big wins - the on-chain record queue. Only verified entries; the full Q2 list (28 wins) lands when the source doc merges to the research library. attestationUid empty = not yet attested. Never invent dates, amounts, or proof URLs.
schema: EAS on Base: string title, string oneLiner, string date, string proofUrl, uint256 winNumber

wins.title: FarHack win with zlank
wins.oneLiner: Won the Snap track at FarHack Online 2026 with zlank, the no-code Farcaster Snap builder - $1,000 that funded the ZAOstock path. Built at the Farcaster Agentic Bootcamp.

wins.title: ZAO Fund 2 on Artizen
wins.oneLiner: The ZAO's second Artizen run went live - officially crowdfunding to bring the artists to Maine for ZAOstock.

wins.title: WaveWarZ x Wide partnership
wins.oneLiner: WaveWarZ, the ZAO's music prediction market, landed a partnership with Wide.
